response.step_by_step_log: Watched video to identify segments. Spoken presentation until 04:27. Music/Voiceover teaser plays from 04:27-04:53. Text 'The Beginning' appears. Lyrics transcribed from on-screen text. Since this is a voice drama teaser, 'Original Artist' is not applicable. Used transcribed text for both original and English translation. Concluded video with final summary.
response.global_summary: The video features a presentation by VTuber Yuzuki Choco about her merchandise, followed by a short audio-visual teaser for a voice drama project titled 'The Beginning', and concluding with a summary of the project.

scenes.end:
04:53.000,original_artist:null,performer_in_video:Yuzuki Choco,reference_lyrics_en: "...Hey, Choco.
Can't I ever see you again?
It's strange, when I hear your words
I somehow start to feel better.
...I want to know a little bit more about you, Choco.
...I want you to like Choco more and more.
These feelings, and this lonely feeling too...
I will eat all of this up.
Because Choco is a little devil, after all.
Hey, if you'd like...
I want you to hear Choco's stories." ,reference_lyrics_og: "……ねえ、ちょこたち
もう二度と会えないの？
不思議ね、キミの言葉を聞くと
なんだか元気が出てきちゃう
……ちょこたちのこと、もう少しだけ知りたいな
……ちょこたちのこと、もっともっと、大好きになってほしい。
この想いも、孤独な気持ちも……
これが全て食べてあげるわ。
ちょこが小悪魔なんだから。
ねえ、もしよければキミに……
ちょこの思い出話、聞いてほしいの。",song_title:The Beginning,start:
scenes.description: A teaser for the 'The Beginning' voice drama plays with on-screen lyrics.
